results.title: “Three boyfriends in the last eight years": Jude Bellingham's girlfriend Ashlyn Castro's reported Michael B. Jordan romance resurfaces
results.description: Jude Bellingham's girlfriend, Ashlyn Castro, has gained attention during the 2026 World Cup, but she was already familiar to celebrity watchers through her reported romance with Michael B. Jordan in 2017. The American model and influencer was later linked to Bellingham in 2025. She has also denied dating rumors surrounding her personal life, insisting she has had only "three boyfriends over the last eight years" despite ongoing online speculation.

results.title: Trump's Big Win! 22 Republicans’ Effort To Halt Daylight Savings Vote Fails; Sunshine Act Passes
results.description: The U.S. House of Representatives has passed the Sunshine Protection Act, moving the country one step closer to ending the twice-a-year clock change. The bipartisan measure cleared the House with a 308-117 vote, despite opposition from 22 Republicans and dozens of Democrats.The legislation would allow states to permanently observe daylight saving time, eliminating the need to "spring forward" and "fall back" every year if approved by the Senate. President Donald Trump, who has long supported ending seasonal clock changes, is expected to sign the bill if it reaches his desk.Supporters say permanent daylight saving time would provide more evening daylight, reduce disruptions to daily routines, improve road safety, and boost tourism and local businesses. Opponents argue it could lead to darker winter mornings, creating safety concerns for schoolchildren and commuters while disrupting agriculture and circadian health.The bill now heads to the Senate, where its future remains uncertain.
